flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Gods Bible School and College are 29% below the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($37.7k vs $53.3k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Gods Bible School and College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (40.0% → 35.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Gods Bible School and College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.6% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Gods Bible School and College fell 56% between 2017 and 2020 ($10.4k → $4.5k).
